title: The infamous kimochi warui card D 88
display_title: The infamous kimochi warui card D 88
wikitext:
[]: The infamous »kimochi warui« card D-88             Quote Post by hirnkrieg » Mon Apr 15, 2013 2:28 pm Some of you may know that there exists a trading card shedding light on the ending of End of Evangelion . The card in question is the Drama card D-88: » Kimochi warui «; however I've never seen a scan or photo of the card. Does one of you good people: have a scan of the card, have the card and wants to take a pic, have the card and wants to tease me with it? Images of the other cards listed on the wiki would also be appreciated!

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Mon Apr 15, 2013 8:34 pm The text on the card says: "Speak only if there is only one other Main Character face-up other than Asuka. All players with Consummation cards corresponding to that character are eliminated." So THAT'S what she meant!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Apr 16, 2013 12:25 am http://www.tesuji.org/nge_ccg_scans/38.jpg But, as noted in this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/3280/Evangelion-Cardass-Masters-Card-Game/ The English translated cards leave out a bit of the description.

[]:             Quote Post by hirnkrieg » Tue Apr 16, 2013 7:16 am http://www.tesuji.org/nge_ccg_scans/38.jpg

chunks.content:
Article: The infamous kimochi warui card D 88
[]: The infamous »kimochi warui« card D-88             Quote Post by hirnkrieg » Mon Apr 15, 2013 2:28 pm Some of you may know that there exists a trading card shedding light on the ending of End of Evangelion . The card in question is the Drama card D-88: » Kimochi warui «; however I've never seen a scan or photo of the card. Does one of you good people: have a scan of the card, have the card and wants to take a pic, have the card and wants to tease me with it? Images of the other cards listed on the wiki would also be appreciated!

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Mon Apr 15, 2013 8:34 pm The text on the card says: "Speak only if there is only one other Main Character face-up other than Asuka. All players with Consummation cards corresponding to that character are eliminated." So THAT'S what she meant!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Apr 16, 2013 12:25 am http://www.tesuji.org/nge_ccg_scans/38.jpg But, as noted in this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/3280/Evangelion-Cardass-Masters-Card-Game/ The English translated cards leave out a bit of the description.

[]:             Quote Post by hirnkrieg » Tue Apr 16, 2013 7:16 am http://www.tesuji.org/nge_ccg_scans/38.jpg
